name: superzhao-skill-lab
description: Experimental manual workflow for evidence-file-bound existing-Skill body candidates.

interface.longDescription: Experimental explicit-only workflow that applies operation and byte bounded body edits, verifies supplied evidence files and controls, and stages a self-contained hash-bound bundle for human review.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $superzhao-skill-lab:optimize-agent-skill to evaluate a proposed Skill change without modifying the active Skill.
